title: Mercedes-Benz Vehicle Configuration
description: Schema for a Mercedes-Benz vehicle configuration as returned by the Car Configurator API.

modelId.description: Mercedes-Benz model identifier within the market.

configurationId.description: Opaque identifier representing the full configuration state.

classId.description: Mercedes-Benz vehicle class identifier (e.g. A, C, E, S, GLE).

bodyId.description: Vehicle body identifier (e.g. saloon, estate, coupe, SUV).

productGroup.description: Configured active product group identifier for the market.

price.description: Aggregate price object for the configuration.

components.description: List of selected components contributing to this configuration.

onlineCode.description: Optional onlinecode under which this configuration has been saved.

images.description: Image URLs for the configuration's vehicle and components.
